commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=482d26dae1ea91e642bd917fccc27a51bb65b01d)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `{ timeoutMs: 210_000 }` to Skill Workshop's `agent_end` hook registration and adds a regression test asserting the registered timeout covers the 180s reviewer cap.

PR surface: Source +5, Tests +19. Total +24 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main registers `agent_end` without opts, the hook runner defaults it to 30000ms, and the Skill Workshop reviewer can run for 45000-180000ms. I did not run a live gateway repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Needs contributor or maintainer follow-up for real behavior proof and acceptance of the longer hook timeout; no narrow automated code repair is evident.

target.title: fix(skill-workshop): align agent_end hook timeout with max reviewer timeout
target.body:
## Summary

- Problem: Skill Workshop `agent_end` hook inherits the hook runner's default 30s timeout, but the configured reviewer (`reviewTimeoutMs`) can be up to 180s. When the reviewer takes longer than 30s, the hook times out before completing, blocking auto-capture proposals and logging `timed out after 30000ms` on routine session close.
- Solution: Pass `{ timeoutMs: 210_000 }` (max reviewTimeout + 30s buffer) when registering the `agent_end` hook so the reviewer always has enough budget to finish within the hook contract.
- What changed: `extensions/skill-workshop/index.ts` (1 line — added `{ timeoutMs: 210_000 }` as the third argument to `api.on("agent_end", ...)`), `extensions/skill-workshop/index.test.ts` (+1 regression test).
- What did NOT change: No other components were affected. The fix is scoped to the hook registration options only.

Fixes #87352

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed:** Skill Workshop `agent_end` hook timed out at 30s while the reviewer timeout can be up to 180s, causing routine session-close timeouts and blocking auto-capture proposals.
- **Real environment tested:** Function-level regression tests in the worktree at `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/issue-87352` with vitest.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:**
  ```bash
  # Skill Workshop plugin tests
  npx vitest run extensions/skill-workshop/index.test.ts

  # Verify hook timeout registration
  npx vitest run extensions/skill-workshop/index.test.ts -t "timeoutMs"
  ```
- **Evidence after fix:**
```text
 ✓ |extensions| skill-workshop > registers the agent_end hook with a timeoutMs
   that covers the max reviewer timeout 2ms

 ✓ |extensions| skill-workshop > keeps agent_end registered but inert when
   auto-capture is disabled 1ms

 ✓ |extensions| skill-workshop > keeps agent_end registered but inert when
   review mode is off 1ms

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  23 passed (23)
```
- **Observed result after fix:** The `agent_end` hook is registered with `{ timeoutMs: 210_000 }`, which is >= the max `reviewTimeoutMs` (180_000) + buffer. All 23 Skill Workshop tests pass, including the new regression test that asserts `opts.timeoutMs >= 180_000`.
- **What was not tested:** Did not start a live OpenClaw instance with Skill Workshop auto-capture enabled, as the fix is a hook registration parameter change (adding `timeoutMs`). The regression test verifies the hook opts are passed correctly; the hook runner's timeout enforcement (`withHookTimeout`) is covered by existing `src/plugins/hooks.test.ts`.

## Regression Test Plan

- Coverage level: Unit test
- Target test file: `extensions/skill-workshop/index.test.ts`
- Scenario locked in: The `agent_end` hook registration includes `opts.timeoutMs >= 180_000` (the configured max `reviewTimeoutMs`). This verifies the hook timeout covers the full reviewer time budget.
- Why this is the smallest reliable guardrail: The test directly asserts the hook registration shape, which would catch any future regression that removes or reduces the timeoutMs option on the agent_end hook.

## Root Cause

- Root cause: `api.on("agent_end", handler)` was called without `timeoutMs`, defaulting to the hook runner's 30s (`src/plugins/hooks.ts:194`). The Skill Workshop reviewer (`reviewTimeoutMs`) defaults to 45s and can be configured up to 180s (`extensions/skill-workshop/src/config.ts:42`). When `runEmbeddedPiAgent` takes longer than 30s, the hook runner times out before the reviewer finishes.
- Missing detection / guardrail: No test asserted the `agent_end` hook registration included a timeoutMs value. The new regression test closes this gap.
target.author: zhangguiping-xydt
